description: Lineage → OpenMetadata sink. Pushes the upstream lineage_graph payload to OpenMetadata via REST API (service → database → schema → table hierarchy + lineage edges).

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: Upstream asset emitting the canonical lineage payload.

api_token_env.label: API Token Env Var
api_token_env.description: Env var holding the JWT bearer token.

database_name.label: Database Name
database_name.description: OpenMetadata Database name under the service.

only_push_on_change.label: Only Push on Change
only_push_on_change.description: Skip the catalog POST when the upstream payload_hash matches the last successfully pushed hash.
